props.caption: The high-bandwidth memory bolted to almost every AI accelerator now trades in New York at a record price

items.note: The RSF has ringed North Kordofan's capital with ten days of drone strikes that killed at least 50; half a million are trapped and the UN calls the city the likely next El Fasher, warning of a coming catastrophe.
Tanker traffic had crept back to about 40 a day, a third of the pre-war norm, before 7 July missiles hit three ships; the strait is open under the Islamabad accord and throttled in practice.
UN monitors reported more than 40 civilians killed and 460 injured in a week, including a drone strike on a Kherson bus, as Ukraine's deep strikes kept hitting Russian oil-refining sites.
Humanoids logged real shifts, JAL's Unitree units at Haneda, Figure on BMW's line, a robot fleet finishing a 100-megawatt solar farm, as SK Hynix priced a record memory listing on the same demand.

items.what: Half a million people are trapped in El Obeid as the RSF ring North Kordofan's capital; ten days of drone strikes killed at least 50 and the UN warns it may be the next El Fasher.
SK Hynix priced its Nasdaq debut at $149 and raised about $26.5bn, the largest US listing ever by a foreign company; it trades as SKHYV before converting to SKHY on 13 July.
Hormuz tanker traffic had recovered only to about 40 a day, a third of the pre-war 120-140, before missiles struck three ships on 7 July and the US reimposed oil sanctions.
UN monitors counted more than 40 civilians killed and over 460 injured in Ukraine in a week, including a drone strike on a public bus in Kherson, with Dnipro and Kharkiv hardest hit.
Bank of America projects humanoid shipments rising from about 90,000 this year toward 1.2 million by 2030, as Unitree targets 20,000 units and AgiBot passed its 10,000th build.
France beat Morocco 2-0 to reach the World Cup semi-finals; FIFA's refereeing chief defended the calls in Argentina's win over Egypt and denied any bias, opening no review.
